{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Sector Control Abidan
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sector Control Abidan]] are local entities that address grade three spatial violations.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
